message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[\"alice\",\"alice\",100],[\"bob\",\"charlie\",90],[\"charlie\",\"bob\",95],[\"alice\",\"bob\",110],[\"alice\",\"alice\",115]]","{\"alice\": [\"ai\", \"music\"], \"bob\": [\"music\"], \"charlie\": [\"ai\", \"travel\"], \"dave\": [\"photography\"]}"],"focus":"Self-interactions, repeated self-events, out-of-order timestamps, and a user present only in interests (no interactions). Tests connected_with_self and first-appearance joined_cluster semantics."},{"input_lines":["[]","{\"uA\": [\"sports\"], \"uB\": [], \"uC\": [\"tech-modern\", \"photography\"]}"],"focus":"Empty interactions with multiple interest-only users (including empty interest list and hyphenated interest tag). Verifies creation of individual communities with no transition_events."},{"input_lines":["[[\"u1\",\"u2\",1],[\"u3\",\"u4\",2],[\"u7\",\"u8\",3],[\"u2\",\"u3\",3],[\"u5\",\"u6\",4],[\"u6\",\"u5\",5],[\"u2\",\"u1\",6],[\"u9\",\"u9\",8],[\"u9\",\"u9\",9]]","{\"u1\": [\"x\", \"y\"], \"u2\": [\"y\"], \"u3\": [\"x\"], \"u4\": [], \"u5\": [\"z\"], \"u6\": [\"z\", \"a\"], \"u7\": [\"m\"], \"u8\": [\"m\", \"n\"], \"u9\": [], \"u10\": [\"solo\"]}"],"focus":"Cluster merges and cycles (merging via intermediary), repeated bidirectional edge causing connected_with_user, timestamp tie cases, self-interaction sequence, and users with missing/empty interests plus an interest-only isolated user."}]}
